label: Medals & militaria (UK / Commonwealth) — full profile (sources thin-live: rolls/gazette lookups not yet wired; calibration pending)

captureSlots.label: Suspension / naming
captureSlots.guidance: Rim naming in raked light, legible end to end.

captureSlots.label: Naming macro
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of the impressed naming — font, spacing, depth.

captureSlots.label: Ribbon / suspension detail
captureSlots.guidance: Ribbon weave and suspension claw, close up.

captureSlots.label: Group layout
captureSlots.guidance: Full group as mounted, in wearing order.

captureSlots.label: Documents
captureSlots.guidance: Certificates, service papers, box of issue, transmission slips.

redFlags.label: Renamed
redFlags.description: Original naming erased and re-cut to a different recipient.

redFlags.label: Copy striking
redFlags.description: Later restrike / copy rather than an original issue.

redFlags.label: Wrong naming style
redFlags.description: Naming font/impressing inconsistent with the issuing period.

redFlags.label: Wrong ribbon
redFlags.description: Ribbon inconsistent with the award (replacement is common, but flag for disclosure).

redFlags.label: Remounted / assembled group
redFlags.description: Group assembled from separate medals rather than as awarded to one recipient.
